name: Offcuts
title: Newsletter
summary: A typographic home and archive for a curated weekly newsletter — featured issue, a full back catalogue, readable issue pages, and a working subscribe form.
setup_questions: What's the newsletter's name and a one-line tagline?
What topic or niche does it cover?
Who's the author, and what's their short bio?
Give me 2-3 recent issue titles with a sentence of what each covered.
photo_terms: stack of design books on table
author portrait at desk window light
sections: Home — what-it-is intro, sample, and email subscribe form
Issue archive — reverse-chronological list of numbered issues with date and one-line summary
Issue page — rendered issue with intro, curated links, and a 'tool of the week' section
based_on: A curated weekly newsletter with a clean public archive in the Dense Discovery / The Browser mold — typographic, numbered issues, prominent subscribe.
